expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md: "Case focus explicitly covered: **missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading**." result.md: "This benchmark’s focus is explicitly: **missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading**." It then details template-save gaps (BCIN-7669/7667/7688) and builder-loading gaps (BCIN-7727/7668).
